title: Buy a Car
goalDescription: Saving up toward a car purchase without taking on more debt than you need to.
resultIntro: Here's a starting point for saving toward your car, based on what you entered.

questions.label: Estimated cost of the car
questions.help: Include fees and registration if you can, not just the sticker price.

questions.label: Amount already saved toward this goal
Expected annual return on savings (%)
questions.help: Leave at 0% if this will sit in a regular savings account rather than an interest-bearing one.
